ddls:
CREATE TABLE "roll_calls" (
  "rollcall_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each roll call vote */,
  "roll_num" INTEGER /* Roll number of the vote */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vote */,
  "bill_id" TEXT /* ID of the bill being voted on */,
  "question" TEXT /* Description of the vote */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the vote (e.g., P, F) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vote */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vote */,
  "congress" INTEGER /* Congress number */,
  "session" INTEGER /* Session number */,
  "voting_body" TEXT /* Voting body (e.g., House, Senate) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., regular, special) */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., electronic, voice) */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the roll call */,
  "total_yea_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of 'Yea' votes */,
  "total_nay_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of 'Nay' votes */,
  "total_present_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of 'Present' votes */,
  "total_not_voting" INTEGER /* Total number of members who did not vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rollcall_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting member */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting member */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the member */,
  "district" TEXT /* District represented by the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "state" TEXT /* State represented by the member */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the member's term */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the member's term */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the member's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "rollcall_id" TEXT /* ID of the roll call vote */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting member */,
  "vote_cast" TEXT /* Vote cast by the member (e.g., Yea, Nay) */,
  "vote_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the vote (if applicable) */,
  "vote_time" TEXT /* Exact time the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_rollcall_id FOREIGN KEY ("rollcall_id") REFERENCES roll_calls ("rollcall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES voting_members ("member_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each roll call vote
ID of the bill being voted on
Result of the vote (e.g., P, F)
Total number of votes cast in the roll call
Total number of members who did not vote
Unique identifier for each voting member
Start date of the member's term
End date of the member's term
URL of the member's profile picture
ID of the roll call vote
Vote cast by the member (e.g., Yea, Nay)
Exact time the vote was cast
